case_title: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BMGV, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT BMGV, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA, ATMOSPHERE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BMGV, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA, ATMOSPHERE $24,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,250.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
